login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use the email and password from your enrollment.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

story.title: Our story
story.body1: Born in 2005 in Riacho He Hé (Formosa), we built a warm, rigorous learning space for every age.
story.body2: We focus on dynamic, playful classes grounded in real-life situations so you use the language with confidence.

modalities.title: On-site & live online
modalities.intro: You can choose the format that fits your routine without giving up the same CEFR-based path, the Ministry of Education of Formosa recognition (Res. 1297/05), and our UTN and Cambridge preparation routes.

presencial.title: On-site classes
presencial.lead: Learn at our campus in Riacho He Hé: guided lessons, steady pacing, and the social energy of a real classroom.
presencial.b1: Small groups with close teacher support and clear speaking practice.
presencial.b2: Printed and digital materials that match each level of the framework.
presencial.b3: Community moments—presentations, screenings, and celebrations—with staff and classmates.

remota.title: Live distance learning
remota.lead: Study from home with 100% live sessions—no passive recordings—with the same objectives and follow-up as on-site courses.
remota.b1: Typically two live meetings per week (60 minutes), with steady instructor guidance.
remota.b2: Reduced groups, guided conversation, and international-standard materials.
remota.b3: Ideal if you want to save travel time while keeping a rigorous rhythm.

alts: Students in an on-site English class, seated at desks with the teacher at the front of the room.
Learners working during a lesson in the institute’s classroom.
Group of children smiling together during an in-person cultural activity at the center.
Students and a teacher celebrating exams with certificates in front of an institute banner.

studentGallery.title: Our students
studentGallery.intro: Tap an album to browse photos from class and celebrations.

levels.title: Study levels
levels.introTrail: : a path from A1 to C2. At C2, the framework describes its ceiling—performance across skills at 100% of the reference.
levels.scaleAria: Visual progression from A1 to C2 along a color band; C2 marks the top of the framework

certs.title: Credentials & pathways
certs.edu: Registered as No. 69 in the non-systemic education registry of the Private Education department. Ministerial Resolution No. 1297/05 Formosa.
certs.utn: You can also pursue national certification through our agreement with UTN Argentina.
certs.cambridge: We prepare students to sit the B2 First Certificate with Cambridge accreditation.
certs.altUtnIngles: English at UTN — National Higher Institute of Technical Teacher Training

import.title: Import students (CSV)
import.hint: Columns supported (Spanish or English headers): nombre/first_name, apellido/last_name, dni or documento, teléfono/phone, email, fecha_nacimiento/birth_date (YYYY-MM-DD), nivel/level (A1–C2), academic_year (default 2026), dni_tutor/tutor_dni, tutor_email, nombre_tutor/apellido_tutor, cuota/monthly_fee (optional). Creates parent account + links when tutor DNI is present. Seeds 12 pending payments for 2026. Password defaults to the student’s DNI (padded to 6 characters if needed).
import.noRows: No valid rows found. Check headers and required fields.
